<Heading

>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v1/departments/{department_uuid}/add"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Add employees and contractors to a department

scope: `departments:write`
